languages.text: Идеально чистый, тонкий механизм скрывает за металлической поверхностью набор неприятного вида игл и капсул.
Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.
languages.original_text: Идеально чистый, тонкий механизм скрывает за металлической поверхностью набор неприятного вида игл и капсул.

traits.locale_text: Beneath its metallic surface, the immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.
Beneath its metallic surface, the immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.
Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.
Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

languages.text: Bajo su superficie metálica, este mecanismo impoluto y delicado oculta toda clase de agujas y cápsulas desagradables.
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: Bajo su superficie metálica, este mecanismo impoluto y delicado oculta toda clase de agujas y cápsulas desagradables.

languages.text: Sous sa surface métallique, ce mécanisme d'une pureté immaculée et d'une grande délicatesse cache tout un ensemble d'aiguilles et de capsules d'aspect peu engageant.
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: Sous sa surface métallique, ce mécanisme d'une pureté immaculée et d'une grande délicatesse cache tout un ensemble d'aiguilles et de capsules d'aspect peu engageant.

languages.text: 金属表面下，这套洁净无瑕的精密机械之中，隐藏着一排排令人不适的针头与胶囊。
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: 金属表面下，这套洁净无瑕的精密机械之中，隐藏着一排排令人不适的针头与胶囊。

languages.text: Unter seiner metallischen Oberfläche verbirgt dieser makellos saubere und empfindliche Mechanismus einige unschöne Nadeln und Kapseln.
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: Unter seiner metallischen Oberfläche verbirgt dieser makellos saubere und empfindliche Mechanismus einige unschöne Nadeln und Kapseln.

languages.text: Bu tertemiz ve hassas mekanizma, metalik yüzeyinin altında tatsız görünümlü bir dizi iğne ve kapsülü gizliyor.
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: Bu tertemiz ve hassas mekanizma, metalik yüzeyinin altında tatsız görünümlü bir dizi iğne ve kapsülü gizliyor.

languages.text: 金属の表面の下には、非常に清潔で繊細な機構が隠れており、その中には針やカプセルといった不快な見た目のものが並んでいます。
languages.original_text: Beneath its metallic surface, this immaculately clean, delicate mechanism conceals an array of unpleasant-looking needles and capsules.

traits.locale_text: 金属の表面の下には、非常に清潔で繊細な機構が隠れており、その中には針やカプセルといった不快な見た目のものが並んでいます。
